title: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Monet. The central beat is the enemy tries to regain control.
scene: The scene focuses on the enemy tries to regain control, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Monet shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well of course- using heat really works!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Do you even wanna fight!? Huh, yuki-onna!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: not again. Now she's over there !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Won't let you follow those children...!!

summary: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
